# Obsidian-Compatible AI Memory

This folder stores reusable knowledge outside chat context.

## Structure

- `specs/`: Linked spec summaries and status notes
- `decisions/`: Architectural and implementation decisions
- `patterns/`: Reusable implementation patterns
- `bugs/`: Root cause and fix history
- `snippets/`: Prompt snippet copies and variants

## Rules

- Keep notes short and searchable.
- One note per topic/decision/bug.
- Link related spec and file paths.
- Prefer referencing note paths in chat instead of retyping context.
